desc.en: Alliance of elite Paris institutions incl. ENS, Dauphine, Mines. Top in France.
desc.zh: 巴黎精英机构联盟，含高师、多芬、矿院。法国第一。

climate.zh: 巴黎气候温和，夏季温暖（20-25°C），冬季阴冷（2-7°C）。春秋最宜人，偶有雨天。
climate.en: Paris has a mild climate. Summers warm (20-25°C), winters cool and grey (2-7°C). Spring/autumn most pleasant, occasional rain.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍有限，多数学生在巴黎市内租房。月租€600-1200，CROUS可申请补贴(CAF)。
housing.en: Limited on-campus housing; most students rent in Paris. €600-1200/month, CROUS subsidies (CAF) available.

employment.zh: 毕业生就业率优秀，法国科研机构、奢侈品行业、金融领域广泛认可。留法毕业生可获2年求职签证。
employment.en: Excellent graduate employment. Recognized in French research institutions, luxury goods, finance. 2-year post-study job-seeking visa available.

healthcare.zh: 法国全民医保体系，学生每年缴纳约€100即可享受公立医疗。大学有校医服务。
healthcare.en: France's universal healthcare. Students pay ~€100/year for public health coverage. Campus medical services available.

application.zh: 通过Parcoursup平台（法国本科）或学校官网申请。需提交成绩单、动机信、推荐信。部分专业需面试。
application.en: Apply via Parcoursup (French undergrad) or school website. Transcripts, motivation letter, recommendations required. Some programs require interview.

safetyDetail.zh: 巴黎整体安全，但需注意扒手（地铁、旅游区）。校区安保良好，24小时监控。
safetyDetail.en: Paris generally safe but beware of pickpockets in metro/tourist areas. Campus security good with 24h monitoring.

deadline.zh: Parcoursup: 1月-3月注册；国际生：通常12月-3月
deadline.en: Parcoursup: Jan-Mar registration; International: usually Dec-Mar

desc.en: France's most prestigious engineering school (X). Founded by Napoleon.
desc.zh: 法国最顶尖工程学院，拿破仑创建。

climate.zh: 巴黎近郊，气候与巴黎相同。夏季温暖，冬季阴冷，四季分明。
climate.en: Located near Paris with identical climate. Warm summers, cool grey winters, four distinct seasons.

housing.zh: 萨克雷校区提供校内宿舍，约€400-600/月。校园生活设施完善。
housing.en: Saclay campus offers on-campus housing ~€400-600/month. Complete campus living facilities.

employment.zh: 法国顶尖工程名校，毕业生薪资全法最高之一。航空、科技、金融领域广泛认可。
employment.en: France's top engineering school with some of the highest graduate salaries in France. Widely recognized in aerospace, tech, finance.

healthcare.zh: 法国全民医保，学生缴纳约€100/年。校内有健康中心。
healthcare.en: France's universal healthcare. Students pay ~€100/year. Campus health center available.

application.zh: 国际生通过学校官网申请Bachelor Program。需数学/科学成绩、英语/法语证明、面试。
application.en: International students apply for Bachelor Program via website. Math/science grades, English/French proficiency, interview required.

safetyDetail.zh: 萨克雷校区位于巴黎南郊，环境安全宁静。校园封闭管理，安保严格。
safetyDetail.en: Saclay campus in southern Paris suburbs—safe and quiet environment. Gated campus with strict security.

desc.en: Historic Paris university. World-renowned for arts, humanities, and sciences.
desc.zh: 巴黎历史名校，文理科学世界闻名。

climate.zh: 巴黎气候，同PSL。温和四季，偶有雨天。
climate.en: Paris climate, same as PSL. Mild four seasons with occasional rain.

housing.zh: 巴黎市内租房为主，€600-1200/月。可申请CROUS宿舍和CAF住房补贴。
housing.en: Mostly renting in Paris, €600-1200/month. CROUS dorms and CAF housing subsidies available.

employment.zh: 法国最古老大学之一，人文、科学领域享有盛誉。毕业可获2年求职签证。
employment.en: One of France's oldest universities, renowned in humanities and sciences. 2-year post-study job-seeking visa available.

healthcare.zh: 法国全民医保，学生约€100/年。

application.zh: 通过Parcoursup（法国本科）或学校官网申请。需成绩单、法语/英语证明、动机信。
application.en: Apply via Parcoursup or university website. Transcripts, French/English proficiency, motivation letter required.

safetyDetail.zh: 巴黎拉丁区（大学所在地）是历史文化区，整体安全。注意扒手。
safetyDetail.en: Latin Quarter (university location) is a historic cultural area, generally safe. Watch for pickpockets.
